creator: jmallett@FreeBSD.org
text: What is standing in the way of this coming to base?  I have only skimmed the driver and don't have a clear sense of if it has any quality issues.  I know that this NIC is extremely popular in home and small business deployments due to its low price and wide availability.  While it may not be an enduring presence in the 10GbE space, it's definitely relevant in the present moment, and if there's any way I can help, I'd like to.
